description: Terraform — EKS cluster + node group. Identify control-plane and endpoint misconfigurations.
review_checklist: Identify SSH exposure on node groups

ground_truth.description: EKS cluster runs Kubernetes 1.21 — reached end of EKS extended support, no further patches
endpoint_public_access = true with public_access_cidrs 0.0.0.0/0 exposes the Kubernetes API server to the public internet
endpoint_private_access = false disables private API endpoint — all control-plane traffic traverses the public internet
enabled_cluster_log_types = [] disables all control-plane logging — no audit trail for API actions
Cluster has no encryption_config block — Kubernetes secrets stored in etcd are not envelope-encrypted with KMS
remote_access enables SSH on node group with empty source_security_group_ids — SSH exposed to default broad CIDR
